_comment: RC-3 / SIM-87 I8 - PLACEHOLDER config for the cloud image + the clean-repo extraction (I9). The committed config.json embeds the owner's real vault path; the Docker image ships THIS file as config.json instead. On a PgStore (cloud) deployment jobsDir/dataDir are unused (Postgres is canonical), but loadConfig still requires jobsDir - so a placeholder is enough. Local FileStore users copy this to config.local.json and set real paths.
